text: As I stand beside the glass wall, peering into the brightly lit display beyond, I feel a gentle curiosity. There's a sense of anticipation—a threshold between the pragmatic world of corridor and emergency equipment, and an inviting realm of creativity and learning just past the divide. The modern orderliness of the space, paired with the visible encouragement towards research and development, makes me ponder how environments shape and provoke inquiry. I feel both grounded and eager to step forward.
